task_description: Multiple UI fixes and improvements for the Shoguns Ascent board game: CSS adjustments to season/player cards modals, Zorro placement bugfix, battle log chronological ordering, battle result window redesign with force badges and bets container, bidding overlay force badge improvements, and figure size adjustments

verification.summary: tsc --noEmit passes with no errors, npm run build succeeds. No test suite in this project (manual testing only).
